entities.name: Professional Introduction Pattern
entities.context: Transformation pair combining warmth with specific details

entities.context: Transformation pair for natural flow combined with personality

entities.context: Transformation pair balancing credibility with low pressure

entities.name: Brief Apology Pattern
entities.context: Transformation pattern for follow-ups when >2 days since meeting

entities.name: Voice-First Structure
entities.context: Email framework: subject, opening warmth, meeting callback, deliverables, next steps, closing

entities.name: Meeting Callback Technique
entities.context: Including specific moments from meeting transcripts in follow-ups

entities.name: Low-Pressure Framing
entities.context: Communication style that reduces pressure on recipients

relationships.context: V's communications are generated through this system
Document stores the transformation pairs used by the system
Meeting callback is a required component of the voice-first email structure
Low-pressure framing is applied to next steps in the structure
V's emails follow this structured approach
